package.name: openral_reasoner_ros
package.description: OpenRAL S2 reasoner lifecycle node (ADR-0018 F4) — direct typed LLM tool-call dispatch. Subscribes to /openral/world_state_slow, /openral/failure/*, /openral/perception/*, /openral/prompt; ticks at 5-10 Hz with event preemption; dispatches one of four openral_core.ReasonerToolCall variants per tick (ExecuteSkill, ReloadGstPipeline, LifecycleTransition, EmitPrompt). The reasoner holds no authority over actuation — it never publishes openral_msgs/ActionChunk.
